name: Retro
description: Neobrutalism. Bold borders, offset shadows, sharp corners, snappy motion. Opinionated and distinctive. Everything feels physical and tactile.
personality: sharp + brutalist elevation + snappy motion + bold borders + no gradients

decorators.retro-card: Rounded container with bold 3px border, 4px offset shadow in dark, and warm cream background tint.
decorators.retro-badge: Pill-shaped badge with saturated color fill, bold uppercase text, and 2px dark border outline.
decorators.retro-input: Bordered input with generous 12px padding, warm cream background, and bold focus ring in primary red.
decorators.retro-button: Chunky button with 3px border, 4px offset shadow that collapses on active press for tactile feedback.
decorators.retro-divider: Thick 2px dashed border separator with warm dark color for section breaks.

retro-card.description: Rounded container with bold 3px border, 4px offset shadow in dark, and warm cream background tint.
retro-card.intent: Use for all content containers. The bold border and offset shadow create the signature neobrutalist tactile, physical feel.

retro-badge.description: Pill-shaped badge with saturated color fill, bold uppercase text, and 2px dark border outline.
retro-badge.intent: Use for labels, tags, and status indicators. The saturated fill and bold border make badges punchy and distinctive.

retro-input.description: Bordered input with generous 12px padding, warm cream background, and bold focus ring in primary red.
retro-input.intent: Use for form inputs that need to feel substantial and tactile. Generous padding and bold focus ring match the brutalist personality.

retro-button.description: Chunky button with 3px border, 4px offset shadow that collapses on active press for tactile feedback.
retro-button.intent: Use for all buttons to create the signature tactile press effect. The shadow collapse on active mimics a physical button press.

retro-divider.description: Thick 2px dashed border separator with warm dark color for section breaks.
retro-divider.intent: Use to create bold, visible section breaks. The dashed style adds playfulness while maintaining the brutalist aesthetic.
